ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Double colon is concealed except on an active line or within a text selection. Source mode is also excluded. Concealed double colon has ".cm-double-colon-conceal" CSS class attached that could be used for customization purposes.
ast.target: 双冒号在活动行或文本选择之外会被隐藏。源代码模式也除外。隐藏的双冒号会附加“.cm-double-colon-conceal” CSS类，可用于自定义。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Double colon will be replaced by this string in the reading view.
ast.target: 在阅读视图中，双冒号将被此字符串替换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Double colon will be replaced by this string in the editing view.
ast.target: 在编辑视图中，双冒号将被此字符串替换。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Conceal double colon in Editing view
ast.target: 在编辑视图中隐藏双冒号
